CreateConnector.description: Grants permission to create an MSK Connect connector

CreateCustomPlugin.description: Grants permission to create an MSK Connect custom plugin

CreateWorkerConfiguration.description: Grants permission to create an MSK Connect worker configuration

DeleteConnector.description: Grants permission to delete an MSK Connect connector

DeleteCustomPlugin.description: Grants permission to delete an MSK Connect custom plugin

DeleteWorkerConfiguration.description: Grants permission to delete an MSK Connect worker configuration

DescribeConnector.description: Grants permission to describe an MSK Connect connector

DescribeConnectorOperation.description: Grants permission to describe a MSK Connect connector operation

DescribeCustomPlugin.description: Grants permission to describe an MSK Connect custom plugin

DescribeWorkerConfiguration.description: Grants permission to describe an MSK Connect worker configuration

ListConnectorOperations.description: Grants permission to list all operations of a given MSK Connect connector

ListConnectors.description: Grants permission to list all MSK Connect connectors in this account

ListCustomPlugins.description: Grants permission to list all MSK Connect custom plugins in this account

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags of an MSK Connect resource

ListWorkerConfigurations.description: Grants permission to list all MSK Connect worker configurations in this account

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag an MSK Connect resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from an MSK Connect resource

UpdateConnector.description: Grants permission to update an MSK Connect connector

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the presence of tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the presence of tag keys in the request
